prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气 工程及其自动化等理工科专业社会热度高热推荐；湖南省2026年物理类考生约347000人，较2025年320192人增长约8.4%，竞争加剧，近年略有下降；山东大学位于山东省，在湖南省无特殊地域偏好；该校在湖南物理类招生约115人/全省32万+考生，占比极小，地域因素影响有限。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 6984, 8009, 7721, 8890, and 9830 respectively, showing a continuous backward shift, with a cumulative backward shift of about 2109 in the last three years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 9830; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Hunan was 99 in 2021, 111 in 2022, 114 in 2023, 119 in 2024, and 115 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 111, a reduction of 4 (-3.5%) compared to 2025, intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class comprehensive university; stable at 21st-22nd on the Soft Science main ranking from 2021 to 2026, ranked 22nd in 2026, top national level; 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative (lingering impact of the 'study buddy' incident), but only 1 incident; Douyin popularity ranked 20th (high heat), with high short video exposure, reflecting high application attention; abnormal admission line signals occurred from 2022 to 2024 (e.g., Shaanxi cutoff, Sichuan adjustment line drop), but have stabilized in recent years; Mathematics A+ (national top), Chinese Language and Literature A, Marxist Theory A, Control Science and Engineering A, Clinical Medicine A-, Physics A-, Computer Science and Technology (not individually rated but strong), and 19 other disciplines rated A- or above; Mathematics, Clinical Medicine, Computer Science and other enrollment majors have outstanding disciplinary strength, strongly attracting Physics Category candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation, and other science and engineering majors are highly recommended due to social popularity; in 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in Hunan is about 347,000, an increase of about 8.4% from 320,192 in 2025, intensifying competition, with a slight decline in recent years; Shandong University is located in Shandong Province, with no special regional preference in Hunan; the university enrolls about 115 Physics Category students in Hunan out of over 320,000 candidates in the province, a very small proportion, so regional factors have limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward shift trend in historical rankings, the 2026 enrollment reduction of 4 (-3.5%) intensifying competition, and the increase of about 8.4% in Physics Category candidates in Hunan further raising competition intensity; meanwhile, the university's high Douyin popularity and top disciplines like Mathematics A+ continue to attract high-scoring candidates. Based on the 2025 baseline of 9830, the minimum ranking is expected to slightly shift backward to about 9675, with a range of 9175-10175.

学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class comprehensive university; stable at 21st–22nd place in the Soft Science main ranking from 2021 to 2026, ranking 22nd in 2026, national top-tier level; the 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative (mainly involving the lingering impact of the 2019 buddy incident), but the number of incidents is only 1, with limited impact; Douyin popularity ranking 20th (high heat), with large short video exposure, reflecting high application attention; abnormal admission score signals appeared from 2022 to 2024, but have stabilized in recent years; Mathematics A+ (national top-tier), Chinese Language and Literature A, Marxist Theory A, Control Science and Engineering A, Clinical Medicine A-, and 19 other disciplines rated A- or above; enrollment majors such as Law, Chinese Language and Literature correspond to strong disciplines, which are highly attractive to liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law, Chinese Language/Literature and other liberal arts majors are socially popular/recommended; in 2026, the number of History Category candidates in Hunan Province is approximately 187,000, an increase of about 31% from 142,547 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition, with a slight upward trend in recent years; Shandong University is located in Shandong Province, with no special regional preference in Hunan Province; the university's enrollment proportion for History Category in Hunan is very small (about 23 students out of over 140,000 candidates in the province), so regional factors have limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the alleviating effect of the 2026 enrollment expansion of 3 students (+13%), and the significant increase of about 31% in the number of History Category candidates in Hunan Province, the expansion cannot fully offset the pressure caused by the surge in candidate numbers; at the same time, factors such as the university's high Douyin popularity and strong advantageous disciplines maintain application enthusiasm.
